scope: GitHub repositories accessible to the connected MrYueHang installation
method: branch comparison for the canonical core
limitations: First pass; no claim that all repository trees or histories were exhaustively reviewed.
ARCHIVE_CANDIDATE is a review state, not deletion permission.
Private repository names and detail rows are intentionally excluded.
Full-tree equality remains open for pairs where only individual blobs matched.
private_detail_policy: Full row-level inventory remains in private audit scope; only aggregates and public evidence may be promoted here.
next_review: Deep-read the 21 empty/metadata-shell candidates before any archive decision.
Compare complete trees for suspected duplicates.
Map each surviving repository to module, domain, owner, data class and successor.
Record repository decisions as reviewed evidence with rollback path.
